changes.description: Added media_json to MessageRow interface and mapMessageRow. Updated all 5 SELECT queries to include media_json column. Extended ingestIncomingMessage to accept tags and store imeta/url tags as mediaJson for incoming messages. Pass dmResult.tags from processGiftWrapEvent.
Added blob-storage:get-blob IPC handler for renderer to read blob metadata by hash
Added getBlob method to BlobStorageApi interface
Extended parseMediaJson to handle incoming format ({tags: [...]}) in addition to outgoing format ({attachments: [...]})
Created hook that tracks upload progress from IPC events, provides per-message progress data

Created component rendering media in message bubbles: ImageAttachment (with CachedImage, blurhash placeholder, lightbox), FileAttachment (icon, name, size, download link), upload progress bar, error state with retry, local blob URL resolution
Integrated MediaAttachments into MessageBubble, added useUploadProgress hook in ConversationPane, added handleRetry function, passed uploadProgress and onRetry props

tests_added: src/renderer/utils/media-parser.test.ts: +2 tests for incoming format parsing (imeta tags, NIP-92 url tags)
src/main/nostling/service.test.ts: +4 tests for incoming media tag storage (imeta, url, no-media, listMessages)
src/renderer/components/MediaAttachments/MediaAttachments.test.ts: +15 tests for rendering decisions per AC

questions.VQ-09-001: PASS - parseMediaJson dual format handling correct
questions.VQ-09-002: PASS - Tag filtering correct (imeta/url only, excludes p tags)
questions.VQ-09-003: PASS - All 5 SELECT queries include media_json
questions.VQ-09-005: PASS - Blurhash rendering correct with performance limits
questions.VQ-09-INT: PASS - After remediation: +21 tests for component logic and progress aggregation
